chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 857 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 29-03-2022 Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Associate of Mr. Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro, Advocate for the Petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- We have gone through the prayer clause and are of the view that this Petition is not maintainable before us, and the Petitioner has to approach the Anti-Encroachment Tribunal for redressal of his grievance. Order accordingly. In view of the above, the Petition stands dismissed, whereas, Petitioner is at liberty to seek alternate remedy in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
